name: Managing Accounts and Billing in Service Cloud
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In Maropost Service Cloud, you always have quick access to your account and billing information through the user profile, which is conveniently located at the top bar of the application."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Click on your account's user profile and access the Account & Billing section, where you can manage your account information, track your subscription plan and usage, find important contact details, and more."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L53N2UNTDN0B/userprofile0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L53N2UNTDN0B/userprofile0.png","name":"userprofile0.png","type":"image/png","size":201885,"width":2880,"height":973,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":845,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T08:44:47+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Account & Billing","bold":true},{"text":" page is divided into the following tabs:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Overview Section","bold":true},{"text":": See your billing plan information, find account and billing-related contact information, explore Maropost services and add-ons, and more."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Company Information Section","bold":true},{"text":": View and edit the account information and company address."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Usage Section","bold":true},{"text":": View your current plan usage."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview Section"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Overview","bold":true},{"text":" section on the Account & Billing page contains your plan summary, important contact information, common actions, and account- and billing-related help."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BOTTDABRFEBG/userprofile1.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BOTTDABRFEBG/userprofile1.png","name":"userprofile1.png","type":"image/png","size":419967,"width":2435,"height":2104,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":846,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T08:49:30+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Company Information Section"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Company Information","bold":true},{"text":" section on the Account & Billing page is where you can update your account information and company address. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Account Information:","bold":true},{"text":"\nYou can only edit some of the following account information:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Account Name","bold":true},{"text":" – (non-editable) Name of your account."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Client Name","bold":true},{"text":" – (non-editable) Name of the company/agency/owner when you have multiple accounts, each specific to a different client."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Industry","bold":true},{"text":" – (Editable) The industry with which your business is associated."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Language","bold":true},{"text":" – (Editable) Your language preference."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Website","bold":true},{"text":" – (Editable) The URL of your company website."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Address:","bold":true},{"text":"\nYou can view and edit the address of your business here."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XOP66VQ29KBB/userprofile2.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XOP66VQ29KBB/userprofile2.png","name":"userprofile2.png","type":"image/png","size":329558,"width":2436,"height":2068,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":847,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T08:56:37+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Usage Section"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Usage","bold":true},{"text":" section on the Account & Billing page displays the current usage metrics for your account. The visual display shows the ticket usage for your account and can be filtered based on monthly and yearly data."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CYL7UZ3XQFS4/userprofile3.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CYL7UZ3XQFS4/userprofile3.png","name":"userprofile3.png","type":"image/png","size":176928,"width":2436,"height":1006,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":848,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T08:57:14+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
